caption: On a lush green soccer field within a stadium featuring red seating and the Real Madrid crest, several staff members work together to pull a large, white tarp across the grass. Some individuals wear blue shirts and dark shorts, while others wear white shirts and dark trousers. In the background, white goalposts stand before red banners displaying text, including "Cervezas Alhambra" and "服务您这里欢迎您". To the right, advertising boards feature the name "A. Moreno" and the phrase "SERVICIOS DE TRANSPORTE". As the sequence progresses, the staff members move from left to right, hauling the heavy white fabric across the turf. The tarp ripples and folds as it is dragged, and the positions of the people shift as they coordinate their efforts to cover the field, moving steadily toward the right side of the frame.
